result:
Stage 1ŌĆō3 complete; smoke is running and will notify me on completion. Report below. Allocation left alive; nothing committed.

## G2 interactive build + 1A smoke ŌĆö turn report

**Placement / one-writer rule.** Live re-check before compute: `squeue -u $USER` empty, `alloc_run.sh --status` empty, no real `claude-hold` holder (the lone `pgrep` hit was the command matching its own search string). I created **exactly one** holder via `alloc_run.sh` ŌĆö interactive allocation **56100487** (node nid004159, qos interactive, 3 h). No sbatch submitted, no second holder. Rationale: single-node, short build + a detached 1A loop that fits one node within the allocation's remaining wall. Wrapped with `HOME=/global/homes/j/josephrb` so `setup_salloc_env.sh` activates the real `root_6_28` prefix (the claude-home conda trap otherwise falls back to the broken legacy path); `srun --export=ALL` propagates it. **Allocation left alive.**

**Stage 1 ŌĆö state.** HEAD = `486e53e` (contains it); four G2 files clean; 0 staged; **474-check source guard re-run: PASS**.

**Stage 2 ŌĆö BUILD/INSTALL: PASS.**
- Source commit `486e53e`; build dir `MINERvA101/opt/build_MINERvA101` (out-of-tree); `cmake --build . --target runEventLoopOmniFold --parallel 16 && cmake --install .`.
- `BUILD_RC=0`, `INSTALL_RC=0` ŌĆö my C++ compiles and links.
- Installed canonical path `MINERvA101/opt/bin/runEventLoopOmniFold`; `command -v` resolves **there** (not a build-tree copy).
- SHA-256 `61d7dfbf7ee38f39e51c656b48702056c773c3d1c5d1b2d9bf08a6da42d2e19b` (changed from pre-build `6b60fc51ŌĆ”`), mtime 2026-07-18 14:36:50. Log: `nd-unfolding/pet/g2_smoke/build_56100487.log`.

**Stage 3 ŌĆö SMOKE: RUNNING (not PASS).** Full playlist-1A, canonical manifests (`2d-unfolding/playlist_manifests/1A_{Data,MC}.txt`; 253 data + 41 MC files, ~659 GB MC), canonical installed binary, `MNV101_DUMP_POINTCLOUD=1 MNV101_FULL_PHASE_SPACE=1` (systematics ON, no `DUMP_UNIVERSES`). Detached `srun` step on 56100487.
- **Output namespace:** isolated work dir `nd-unfolding/pet/g2_smoke/work/` ŌĆö the binary's fixed `runEventLoopOmniFold.root` is contained there (= the `.partial`); atomic-rename to the final G2 name happens **only after** validation. No canonical/recoil-only path touched.
- **Owner-identifiable / logs:** background task `bpt5zs8ya` ŌåÆ `srun` on job 56100487; log `.../work/loop.log`; exit ŌåÆ `loop.rc` + `DONE|FAILED` sentinel.
- **Progress:** env sourced, MnvTune reweighters loaded, truth-denom loop at ~12.6M / 22,191,105 entries and climbing; partial ROOT growing. (The `Entries=-2147483648` log line is a pre-existing int-counter overflow in the standard RPA input `outNievesRPAratio-nu56Fe`, unrelated to my change.)
- **Follow-up trigger:** background task `bpt5zs8ya` re-invokes me on exit (same-owner, in-context). On completion I run `nd-unfolding/pet/validate_g2_fullevent_smoke.py` (Stage-4 fail-closed checks ŌåÆ JSON receipt) on the compute node.

**Stage 4 ŌĆö validator:** written (`nd-unfolding/pet/validate_g2_fullevent_smoke.py`, syntax-checked), covers every required fail-closed check (4 trees + positive POT; `petSchemaVersion=g2-fullevent-v1`/`hasFullEventSchema=1`/`fullPhaseSpace=1`; runtime population of `ev_run/ev_subrun/ev_gate`, `part_reco_view/time`, all reco/truth muon/vertex branches; distinct schemas + forbidden counterparts absent; equal E/pos/z/view/time lengths; bkg cloud + `w_bkg`; native misses = `sim_pass=0` + reco sentinels + empty reco vectors + valid cached truth identity/muon/vertex; `|mc_signal_reco| == |mc_truth_denom|`). **Not yet run** ŌĆö no ROOT.

**Stage 5 ŌĆö commit:** **none.** Validation counts: N/A (pending). Status doc updated locally to **BUILD-PASS / SMOKE-PENDING** and validator staged on disk, both **uncommitted** ŌĆö per instruction, no publication-evidence commit while the smoke runs.

**Remaining gate:** smoke completion ŌåÆ validator PASS ŌåÆ atomic rename to final G2 ROOT ŌåÆ commit+push only the status doc + validator + JSON receipt (never the large ROOT/log, canonical ND docs, or A/B/C files). I'll act on the `bpt5zs8ya` completion notification. One-writer rule preserved; allocation 56100487 left running.
